custom.notes: Custom endpoints stay gateway-only until a curated product profile exists.

minimax-intl-anthropic-coding.notes: MiniMax Anthropic-compatible endpoint supports the Claude lane only through a verified runtime profile, not a generic product SDK lane.

minimax-intl-openai-general.notes: MiniMax OpenAI-compatible endpoint supports the Responses wire required by the Codex sidecar only through a verified runtime profile.

google/gemini-3-pro-image-preview.displayName: Google: Nano Banana Pro (Gemini 3 Pro Image Preview)

google/gemini-3.1-flash-image-preview.displayName: Google: Nano Banana 2 (Gemini 3.1 Flash Image Preview)

google/gemini-3.1-pro-preview-customtool.displayName: Google: Gemini 3.1 Pro Preview Custom Tools

zai-shared-anthropic-coding.notes: Z.AI Anthropic-compatible endpoint supports the Claude lane only through a verified runtime profile; Z.AI OpenAI-compatible endpoints remain gateway-only because they are chat-completions only.

zai-shared-openai-coding.notes: Z.AI OpenAI-compatible coding endpoint is chat-completions only; do not route it through the Codex sidecar.

zai-shared-openai-general.notes: Z.AI OpenAI-compatible general endpoint is chat-completions only; do not route it through the Codex sidecar.

modelStatus.current: Verified available and a sensible default on checkedAt.
modelStatus.legacy: Still callable but superseded — kept for compatibility, not default-recommended.
modelStatus.retired: Scheduled for or past shutdown — must not be used as a default.

verification.note: Default models and leaf model ids below were verified against each provider's official model list / API docs / deprecation notice on `checkedAt`. Do not trust these as 'latest/recommended/usable' once `checkedAt` is older than `staleAfterDays`, or once any model's `retiresOn` is reached — re-verify against the live source first. `pnpm provider:check` gates this (fails on a retired default or a passed `retiresOn`; warns on staleness). `pnpm provider:refresh` re-pulls community context-window/pricing from litellm + openrouter; provider-tier default ids stay hand-verified here.
